author: developeruche
content:
Made a PR to the [ere-guest](https://github.com/eth-act/ere-guests/pull/38) repo that introduces a spec compliant `zilkworm` guest program to the ere stack. it is a continuation of some sort of the work done by <@976542403269910539> and <@425274498732916736>

Similar to how `reth-stateless` handles testing, using the EF test [this way](https://github.com/paradigmxyz/stateless) the same test cases was implemented for this cpp guest program
 
The ELF builds and is ready to be proven inside SP1 hypercube, with a mock block in this repo;
https://github.com/developeruche/z6m-sp1

Currently the output elf is only for SP1 but other zkVM can be implemented using the `core` lib introducing specific linkers, sys-call handlers for the various zkVMs, this should not be a problem anymore soon with the progress of the zkVM standardization efforts


<@976542403269910539> and <@425274498732916736>, I would appreciate a review of this 🙏 


for visibility:  <@427491045308235776> <@774033563732541451>

author: somnergy
content: I just realised i forgot putting copyright on many files in zilkworm

author: developeruche
content: Good catch! I can definitely patch those in.
